title: CJC+DAC
description: CJC-1295 with DAC (Drug Affinity Complex) is a modified GHRH analog with an extended half-life of approximately 8 days. The DAC modification allows for less frequent dosing while maintaining elevated growth hormone levels.

research.title: Prolonged GH-releasing effects of CJC-1295 with DAC
research.summary: Research shows the DAC modification extends half-life to approximately 8 days, allowing weekly dosing.

research.title: Safety and efficacy of CJC-1295
research.summary: Clinical trials demonstrate sustained IGF-1 elevation with good tolerability in healthy subjects.

sentiment.summary: Users appreciate the convenience of weekly dosing. Some prefer non-DAC version for more pulsatile GH release. Results are similar to CJC-1295 without DAC but require less frequent administration.

effects.label: Trade-offs:
effects.description: Convenience vs. less natural pulsatile GH pattern.

effects.label: Some Prefer Non-DAC:
effects.description: More natural GH release pattern without DAC.

effects.label: Good for Compliance:
effects.description: Better for those who dislike frequent injections.

sideEffects.label: Similar to CJC-1295:
sideEffects.description: Water retention, numbness, joint pain possible.

sideEffects.label: Extended Half-Life:
sideEffects.description: Side effects may persist longer due to extended action.

availability.label: Verify Purity:
availability.description: Important to source from reputable vendors.

availability.label: Often Compared:
availability.description: Choose between DAC and non-DAC based on preferences.
